title: subworkflow - azure remediate restore managed disk from snapshot
description:
Subworkflow: Restore an Azure managed disk from its latest snapshot during impairment incidents.

This remediation subworkflow starts an Azure Automation runbook job, waits for completion, and verifies the execution result before returning.

Parameters
primaryResourceId (Required): Primary Azure resource identifier targeted by remediation.
azuresubscriptionid (Required): Azure Subscription ID.
azureresourcegroup (Required): Resource group of the target Azure resource.
automationresourcegroup (Required): Resource group of the Azure Automation Account.
automationaccountname (Required): Azure Automation Account name.
dynatraceazureconnection (Required): Dynatrace Azure OIDC connection name.

This workflow never fire-and-forgets and always performs wait plus success verification.
guide:
## Restore an Azure managed disk from its latest snapshot during impairment incidents.

This subworkflow remediates a common Azure outage scenario by executing an Azure Automation runbook and validating completion.

### 🎯 Purpose
- Restore an Azure managed disk from its latest snapshot during impairment incidents.

### ⚙️ Parameters
- 🔑 **primaryResourceId** (Required): Primary Azure resource ID to remediate.
- 🔵 **azuresubscriptionid** (Required): Azure Subscription ID.
- 📁 **azureresourcegroup** (Required): Resource group of the target resource.
- 📁 **automationresourcegroup** (Required): Resource group of the Automation Account.
- 🤖 **automationaccountname** (Required): Azure Automation Account name.
- 🔌 **dynatraceazureconnection** (Required): Dynatrace Azure OIDC connection.

### ▶️ Execution Behavior
- ▶️ Starts Azure Automation runbook **Invoke-AzDiskRestoreFromSnapshot**.
- ⏳ Waits for execution completion using dependency subworkflow.
- ✅ Verifies status and fails if execution is not Completed.

### 📋 Azure Runbook
- **Invoke-AzDiskRestoreFromSnapshot**

### 🔗 Dependencies
- 📎 Requires subworkflow **subworkflow - azure wait for automation runbook job**.

check-status.description: Validate Azure Automation runbook job completion status.
